mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_auth_rfsh_tkn ( mbr_acct_idx, tkn_hash, expr_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{mbrAcctIdx}, #{tknHash}, #{exprAt}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT auth_rfsh_tkn_idx AS idx, auth_rfsh_tkn_uuid AS uuid, mbr_acct_idx, tkn_hash, expr_at, created_by, created_at, del_at FROM tb_auth_rfsh_tkn WHERE tkn_hash = #{tknHash} AND del_at IS NULL
